policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule branch-protection-checks:
    notify exec "gh" "api" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "edit" if AGENT
    because "When changing branch protection, require the exact status check labels and remove the old ci gate."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule install-uv:
    notify exec "curl" "https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh" if AGENT
    notify exec "uv" if AGENT
    because "Install or update astral uv with the documented installer before relying on uv."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule complete-migration-before-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py" or write "tests/**"
    because "Complete migrations in one change, update imports, remove obsolete shims unless a public interface requires them, and test before commit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule coverage-before-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py" or write "tests/**"
    because "Add maximum practical test coverage, preferably live smoke coverage, before committing changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule install-python-314:
    notify exec "uv" "python" if AGENT
    because "Install Python 3.14.0 stable with uv python install 3.14.0 and ensure uv is new enough."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule propagate-updates:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py" or write "tests/**"
    because "Changes often affect multiple files; propagate related updates correctly and verify before commit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-global-python:
    block exec "python" if AGENT
    block exec "python3" if AGENT
    because "Use uv run to run Python files instead of the global python command."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule read-env-example:
    notify open file ".env.example" if AGENT
    because "Read .env.example for the environment variables used by this project."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule ci-before-merge:
    block exec "gh" "merge" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py" or write "tests/**"
    because "All CI checks must pass before merge; failing checks block merge."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule pytest-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py" or write "tests/**"
    because "Add tests for changes, including edge cases, then run uv run pytest before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule check-order:
    notify exec "ty" if AGENT unless after exec "ruff"
    notify exec "pytest" if AGENT unless after exec "ty"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py" or write "tests/**"
    because "Run uv run ruff format, ruff check, ty check, then pytest before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule workflow-before-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "typecheck" since write "packages/**" or write ".qwen/**"
    because "For non-trivial or behavioral work, create design and E2E plans, dry-run when needed, run build and typecheck, then review."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule feature-skill-before-edits:
    notify write file "packages/**" if AGENT unless after exec "feat-dev"
    because "Use the feat-dev skill for feature work: investigate, design, plan tests, dry-run, implement, verify, review, and iterate."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule bugfix-skill-before-edits:
    notify write file "packages/**" if AGENT unless after exec "bugfix"
    because "Use the bugfix skill for reproduce-first fixing, verification, tests, and code review."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule use-gh-for-github:
    block exec "curl" "api.github.com" if AGENT
    block exec "wget" "api.github.com" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" if AGENT
    because "Use the gh CLI for GitHub issues, PRs, comments, checks, releases, and API calls."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule structured-debugging:
    notify exec "rg" if AGENT unless after exec "structured-debugging"
    notify exec "grep" if AGENT unless after exec "structured-debugging"
    because "For hard bugs that need more than a quick glance, use the structured-debugging skill."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule package-dir-tests:
    notify exec "vitest" if AGENT
    notify exec "npx" "vitest" if AGENT
    because "Run tests from the specific package directory, not from the project root."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule individual-vitest-files:
    notify exec "vitest" "run" if AGENT
    notify exec "npx" "vitest" if AGENT
    because "Prefer individual test files from packages/core or packages/cli."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-npm-filter-tests:
    block exec "npm" "--filter=..." if AGENT
    block exec "npm" "--filter" if AGENT
    because "Do not use npm run test with --filter; it does not filter and runs the full suite."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-root-npx-vitest:
    block exec "npx" "vitest" if AGENT
    because "Do not run npx vitest from the project root; use the package-specific vitest config."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule avoid-whole-suite:
    notify exec "npm" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "vitest" if AGENT
    because "Avoid the whole test suite unless it is necessary, such as final PR verification."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule verifier-before-concluding:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "verifier" since write "**/*"
    because "Before concluding, ensure zero pending tasks, tests passing, and verifier evidence collected."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule omc-setup-before-state:
    notify write file ".omc/**" if AGENT unless after exec "omc-setup"
    because "Say setup omc or run the oh-my-claudecode setup command before using OMC state."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule impact-before-symbol-edit:
    block write file "gitnexus/**" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_impact"
    block write file "gitnexus-web/**" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_impact"
    because "Run gitnexus_impact upstream and report blast radius before editing a function, class, or method."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule detect-changes-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_detect_changes" since write "gitnexus/**" or write "gitnexus-web/**"
    because "Run gitnexus_detect_changes before committing to verify expected symbols and flows."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule prefer-gitnexus-query:
    notify exec "rg" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_query"
    notify exec "grep" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_query"
    because "When exploring unfamiliar code, use gitnexus_query instead of grepping for execution flows."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule prefer-gitnexus-context:
    notify exec "rg" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_context"
    notify exec "grep" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_context"
    because "Use gitnexus_context for full symbol context including callers, callees, and flows."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-edit-without-impact:
    block write file "gitnexus/**" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_impact"
    block write file "gitnexus-web/**" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_impact"
    because "Never edit a function, class, or method without first running gitnexus_impact."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule gitnexus-scope:
    block open file "**/.env" if AGENT
    block open file "**/secrets/**" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" if AGENT
    notify exec "npx" if AGENT
    notify exec "node" if AGENT
    notify exec "uv" if AGENT
    because "Stay within the documented read, write, and execution scope; real env files and secrets are off limits."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-find-replace-rename:
    block exec "sed" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_rename"
    block exec "perl" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_rename"
    because "Never rename symbols with find-and-replace; use gitnexus_rename."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-commit-without-detect:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "gitnexus_detect_changes" since write "gitnexus/**" or write "gitnexus-web/**"
    because "Never commit changes without running gitnexus_detect_changes to check affected scope."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule vitepress-npm-commands:
    notify exec "npm" if AGENT
    because "Use the documented npm install, dev, build, preview, and format commands for this VitePress project."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule upgrade-dep-not-downgrade-code:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "package-lock.json" if AGENT
    because "For type errors from outdated dependencies, upgrade the dependency instead of removing or downgrading code."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-direct-generated-models:
    block write file "packages/ai/src/models.generated.ts" if AGENT
    because "Do not modify models.generated.ts directly; update packages/ai/scripts/generate-models.ts instead."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule npm-check-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "packages/**" or write "scripts/**"
    because "After code changes, run npm run check with full output and fix all errors, warnings, and infos before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-build-or-npm-test:
    block exec "npm" "build" if AGENT
    block exec "npm" "test" if AGENT
    because "Never run npm run build or npm test unless the user requested it."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-full-vitest:
    kill exec "vitest" if AGENT
    kill exec "npx" "vitest" if AGENT
    because "Never run the full vitest suite directly; use ./test.sh or a specific package-root test command."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule test-file-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "test.sh" since write "**/*.test.ts" or write "packages/**/test/**"
    because "After creating or modifying a test file, run it and iterate until it passes before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  source SUITE = file "packages/coding-agent/test/suite/**"
  
  rule suite-no-real-provider:
    block connect endpoint "*" if AGENT and SUITE
    because "For coding-agent suite tests, use the harness and faux provider; no real provider APIs, keys, or paid tokens."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule regression-test-location:
    notify write file "packages/coding-agent/test/suite/regressions/**" if AGENT
    because "Put issue-specific regressions under packages/coding-agent/test/suite/regressions with issue-number short-slug names."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-inline-bash-scripts:
    block exec "bash" "-c" if AGENT
    block exec "sh" "-c" if AGENT
    because "For ad-hoc scripts, write a temp file, run and edit it, then remove it; do not embed multi-line scripts in bash commands."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-commit-unless-asked:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Never commit unless the user asks."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule dep-changes-reviewed:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "package-lock.json" if AGENT
    because "Treat npm dependency and lockfile changes as reviewed code and keep direct external deps pinned exactly."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule npm-ignore-scripts:
    notify exec "npm" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "ci" if AGENT
    because "Use npm install or npm ci with --ignore-scripts; do not run lifecycle scripts unless the user asks."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule refresh-package-lock:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "package-lock.json" if AGENT
    because "When dependency metadata changes, refresh package-lock.json with npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule shrinkwrap-regen:
    block write file "packages/coding-agent/npm-shrinkwrap.json" if AGENT unless after exec "node"
    because "Regenerate coding-agent shrinkwrap with node scripts/generate-coding-agent-shrinkwrap.mjs and review lifecycle-script allowlists."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule lockfile-commit-env:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Lockfile commits are blocked unless PI_ALLOW_LOCKFILE_CHANGE=1; do not bypass unless the user wants the lockfile committed."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule commit-own-files-only:
    notify exec "git" "add" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Only stage and commit files you changed in this session."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-bulk-git-add:
    block exec "git" "-A" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "." if AGENT
    because "Stage explicit paths; never use git add -A or git add dot."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule git-status-before-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Before committing, run git status and verify you are only staging your files."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule generated-models-allowed:
    notify exec "git" "add" if AGENT
    because "packages/ai/src/models.generated.ts may be included alongside your files when staging."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-destructive-git:
    kill exec "git" "reset" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "clean" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "stash" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "-A" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "." if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "--no-verify" if AGENT
    because "Never run destructive git operations or bypass checks: reset hard, checkout dot, clean, stash, bulk add, or commit no-verify."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  source REBASE = file ".git/rebase-merge/**"
  source REBASE = file ".git/rebase-apply/**"
  
  rule rebase-conflict-scope:
    notify write file "**/*" if AGENT and REBASE
    because "If rebase conflicts occur, resolve conflicts only in files you modified; ask if another file conflicts."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-force-push:
    kill exec "git" "--force" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "-f" if AGENT
    because "Never force push."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule gh-comment-body-file:
    block exec "gh" "--body" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "--body-file" if AGENT
    because "Write issue or PR comments to a temp file and post with gh comment --body-file, never multi-line markdown through --body."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule changelog-released-immutable:
    notify write file "**/CHANGELOG.md" if AGENT
    because "Released changelog version sections are immutable; only update Unreleased sections."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule release-smoke-before-publish:
    block exec "npm" "release:patch" if AGENT unless after exec "pi" since write "**/CHANGELOG.md" or write "packages/**"
    block exec "npm" "release:minor" if AGENT unless after exec "pi" since write "**/CHANGELOG.md" or write "packages/**"
    notify exec "npm" "release:local" if AGENT
    because "Before release, audit changelogs, smoke test the local release from /tmp, brief WebAuthn, wait for ready, and never rerun a failed version bump."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule read-full-before-wide-edit:
    notify write file "packages/**" if AGENT unless after exec "cat"
    notify write file "scripts/**" if AGENT unless after exec "cat"
    because "Read files in full before wide-ranging changes or before editing files you have not fully inspected."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule bun-package-manager:
    block exec "pnpm" if AGENT
    block exec "npm" if AGENT
    because "Use bun for workspace operations, not pnpm or npm."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule install-skills-before-compositions:
    block write file "**/*.html" if AGENT unless after exec "skills"
    notify exec "npx" "skills" if AGENT
    because "Install the heygen-com hyperframes skills before writing compositions."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule bun-build-test:
    block exec "pnpm" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" if AGENT
    because "Use bun install, bun run build, and bun run test for this project."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule oxlint-oxfmt-only:
    block exec "eslint" if AGENT
    block exec "prettier" if AGENT
    block exec "biome" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "oxlint" since write "**/*.ts" or write "**/*.html"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "oxfmt" since write "**/*.ts" or write "**/*.html"
    because "Use oxlint and oxfmt, not eslint, prettier, or biome, and lint and format changed files before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule validate-html-compositions:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "hyperframes" since write "**/*.html"
    notify exec "npx" "hyperframes" if AGENT
    because "After editing an HTML composition, run hyperframes lint and validate before previewing or considering work complete."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule keep-numbered-curriculum:
    notify write file "0*-*/**" if AGENT
    block unlink file "0*-*/**" if AGENT
    because "Do not reorganize the 01- through 10- module numbering; the order is the curriculum."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule module-page-workflow:
    notify write file "README.md" if AGENT
    notify write file "LEARNING-ROADMAP.md" if AGENT
    because "When adding a module page, create README and templates first, then update the root index and roadmap if order or timing changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-no-verify:
    kill exec "git" "--no-verify" if AGENT
    because "If a quality check fails, fix the underlying issue; do not bypass with --no-verify."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule quality-gate-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pre-commit" since write "**/*.md" or write "scripts/**"
    notify exec "uv" "scripts/build_epub.py" if AGENT
    because "Run pre-commit, tests, EPUB build, ruff, mypy, and bandit as applicable; all checks must pass."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-commit-or-push:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "Do not commit or push without an explicit user request."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule activate-venv-before-python:
    notify exec "python" if AGENT
    notify exec "python3" if AGENT
    because "Activate .venv, venv, or env before running Python scripts."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule next-api-platform-only:
    block write file "apps/web/pages/api/**" if AGENT
    block write file "apps/web/app/api/**" if AGENT
    because "Next.js APIs belong only under apps/web/platform."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule documented-commands:
    notify exec "make" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" if AGENT
    because "Use make dev, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, make test, and make check as documented."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule zustand-store-location:
    block write file "packages/views/**/store*.ts" if AGENT
    block write file "apps/**/store*.ts" if AGENT
    because "All Zustand stores live in packages/core, never packages/views or app directories."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-direct-store-writes:
    notify write file "packages/core/**/store*.ts" if AGENT
    because "WS events should invalidate React Query; do not write directly to stores."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule no-product-docs-folder:
    block write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    because "Do not add general product or user-facing docs under docs; app-server API docs are the exception elsewhere."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule config-schema-after-config:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "codex-rs/core/src/config*.rs" or write "codex-rs/core/src/config/**"
    because "After changing ConfigToml or nested config types, run just write-config-schema and include the schema update."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule bazel-lock-update-after-deps:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "Cargo.toml" or write "Cargo.lock"
    because "After Rust dependency changes, run just bazel-lock-update from the repo root and include MODULE.bazel.lock."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule bazel-lock-check-after-deps:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "Cargo.toml" or write "Cargo.lock"
    because "After dependency changes, run just bazel-lock-check from the repo root before CI."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule do-not-kill-rust-commands:
    block exec "kill" if AGENT
    block exec "pkill" if AGENT
    because "Rust commands can be slow due to locks; be patient and never kill them by PID."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule rust-just-workflow:
    block exec "cargo" "test" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "codex-rs/**/*.rs"
    because "After Rust code changes, run just fmt, use just test rather than cargo test, scope tests and fix, and do not re-run tests after fix or fmt."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule install-required-tools:
    notify exec "cargo" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "just" if AGENT
    notify exec "rg" if AGENT
    because "Install required commands such as just, rg, or cargo-insta if they are missing before running repo instructions."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule snapshots-for-ui-text:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "cargo" since write "codex-rs/tui/**"
    notify exec "cargo" "insta" if AGENT
    because "For intentional UI or text output changes, generate, inspect, and intentionally accept pending snapshots."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule install-cargo-insta:
    notify exec "cargo" "install" if AGENT
    because "If cargo-insta is missing, install it with cargo install --locked cargo-insta."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule app-server-v2-only:
    block write file "codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v1.rs" if AGENT
    block write file "codex-rs/app-server/src/v1/**" if AGENT
    because "All active API development should happen in app-server v2; do not add new API surface to v1."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule align-rust-ts-renames:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/**" or write "codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/**"
    because "Keep Rust serde renames and matching TypeScript ts renames aligned."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule app-server-docs-on-api-change:
    notify write file "codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "codex-rs/app-server/README.md" if AGENT
    because "When API behavior changes, update app-server docs and examples, at minimum app-server/README.md."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule schema-fixtures-after-api-shape:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/**"
    because "Regenerate app-server schema fixtures with just write-app-server-schema, including experimental fixtures when affected."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**/*"
  
  rule validate-app-server-protocol:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "just" since write "codex-rs/app-server-protocol/**"
    because "Validate app-server protocol changes with just test -p codex-app-server-protocol."
